task_details: Add a Hebrew 'calm mode' banner string and three new user_preference defaults. Banner text on first home-tab open: 'אצלנו אין סטריקים. אין פרסומות. אין עונשים. אתה בשליטה.' Add three boolean keys to user_preferences with default False: show_streaks, daily_reminders_enabled, weekly_summary_email. Do NOT delete existing streak/notification code — only flip defaults to OFF and add the toggles in a new Settings → 'מצב שקט' (Calm Mode) section.
rationale: Only one task is pending and it is in-window (Israel local time 00:10 IDT, inside the 22-03 quiet window). It is allowlisted (improve_copy). The task was auto-reverted on 2026-05-27 at 17:36 after the previous build catastrophically truncated app_user.py mid-UTF8 (rejected verdict 2026-05-27_161243_sel). All other files from that build (user_meal_preferences.py, repository, pages/14_settings.py, config/strings_he.json) were rolled back to baseline, then config/strings_he.json was later repopulated by the GLP-1 build to 662 bytes containing 3 home.* keys + 6 glp1.* keys. show_streaks already exists in user_meal_preferences.py at line 122 with default False; daily_reminders_enabled and weekly_summary_email are still missing. FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT exists in feature_flags.py but is currently True (was False originally — possibly flipped by an earlier failed build, but in any case the banner gating still needs to point at it). Selecting this task is the right move because there is nothing else in the queue, recent verdicts are healthy (last 5: approve, reject, uncertain, uncertain, approve — circuit breaker not tripped), and we now know the precise failure mode to defend against.
acceptance_criteria: user_meal_preferences.py adds two new boolean fields: daily_reminders_enabled: bool = False and weekly_summary_email: bool = False; show_streaks: bool = False already present is preserved unchanged. Both new fields round-trip through to_dict and from_dict with default False.

config/strings_he.json gains key 'home.calm_mode_banner' (or equivalent calm-mode key) with the EXACT string 'אצלנו אין סטריקים. אין פרסומות. אין עונשים. אתה בשליטה.' — all existing keys (home.protein_today_header, home.primary_metric_toggle.*, glp1.*) MUST be preserved byte-for-byte.

app_user.py home/targets tab area renders the banner on first open per session, gated by feature_flags.FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT AND a session_state 'shown' marker so it appears at most once per session. The banner must be inserted purely additively — no existing lines may be deleted or rewritten.

pages/14_settings.py 'מצב שקט' section exposes toggles for daily_reminders_enabled and weekly_summary_email (the show_streaks toggle, if already present, stays unchanged). Toggles persist via the existing user_meal_preferences repository.

STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY: after the build, app_user.py must (a) decode cleanly as UTF-8, (b) parse with `python3 -m py_compile`, (c) have byte length within ±2000 bytes of the pre-build value (currently 69597 bytes — a sudden drop indicates truncation), and (d) still contain ALL four tab blocks 'with tab_targets:', 'with tab_plan:', 'with tab_summary:', 'with tab_inventory:' at their original locations (verify all four substrings are still present and tab_inventory still has a body, i.e. line count between `with tab_inventory:` and EOF must remain comparable to the original).

Diff scope: ONLY the following files may be modified — nutrition_app/models/user_meal_preferences.py, nutrition_app/repositories/user_meal_preferences_repository.py (only if needed for round-trip), config/strings_he.json, app_user.py, pages/14_settings.py. NO other file may change. No file may be deleted. No file may be truncated.

Feature flag FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT remains registered in nutrition_app/feature_flags.py. (The builder MAY flip its default back to False if appropriate for a not-yet-shipped banner, but if it does so, that change must be reflected in the build report.)
execution_hint: DEFENSIVE EDIT — the prior build on this exact task corrupted app_user.py by truncating mid-UTF8 and deleting the entire `with tab_inventory:` block (lines 1291+ in current file). Do NOT regenerate or rewrite app_user.py whole-file. Concrete steps: (1) BEFORE any edit, snapshot: `tar -czf storage_agents/audit/backups/2026-05-27_211009_sel_before.tar.gz app_user.py pages/14_settings.py nutrition_app/models/user_meal_preferences.py nutrition_app/repositories/user_meal_preferences_repository.py config/strings_he.json nutrition_app/feature_flags.py` and record `wc -c app_user.py` (expected 69597). (2) For app_user.py use line-precise insertion ONLY (e.g. the Edit tool with a unique multi-line `old_string` anchor near line 1156 `with tab_targets:` and `new_string` = anchor + appended banner block). Do NOT use Write on app_user.py. (3) After every app_user.py edit, immediately run `python3 -m py_compile app_user.py`, `wc -c app_user.py` (must remain ~69597 ± banner-additions only), and `grep -c '^with tab_' app_user.py` (must remain >=4). If any check fails, abort and restore from the tar backup. (4) Add daily_reminders_enabled and weekly_summary_email to user_meal_preferences.py as additive fields and extend to_dict/from_dict; keep show_streaks untouched. (5) Append the calm-mode banner key to config/strings_he.json by parsing→dict-update→re-dumping with ensure_ascii=False so existing home.* and glp1.* keys are preserved. (6) Wire the banner read in app_user.py via an additive helper function placed above the `tab_targets, tab_plan, tab_summary, tab_inventory = st.tabs(...)` line at ~line 1147, and call `st.info(banner)` inside the `with tab_targets:` block by inserting a 4-line block immediately after the `with tab_targets:` opener, gated by `if FF_CALM_MODE_DEFAULT and not st.session_state.get('_calm_banner_shown'): ... st.session_state['_calm_banner_shown'] = True`. (7) Add the two new toggles to pages/14_settings.py inside the existing 'מצב שקט' section using line-anchored Edit calls, not whole-file rewrites. (8) Final verification BEFORE marking executed: re-run py_compile on app_user.py and pages/14_settings.py, re-check byte-size delta, and re-confirm all four `with tab_*:` blocks are present. Builder should run `python3 -m nutrition_app.agents.task_executor --task-id de41286a-1fa5-4fb9-9e36-2e5419cb19e0` only if that executor enforces these guards; otherwise prefer direct, line-anchored edits.
